name: vibebus
description: Project-scoped coordination for independent Codex tasks.

interface.longDescription: Use a local SQLite fact bus and Windows current-user credential vault for recoverable agents, responsibility-domain policy, bounded Git/test lifecycle facts, directed message lifecycles, atomically claimed tasks, Codex thread bindings, renewable file reservations, replay-safe event subscriptions, operator-approved bounded retention, and structured handoffs across independent Codex tasks.
defaultPrompt: Register this task with VibeBus and check its inbox.
Use VibeBus to coordinate this work with the other project tasks.
